reviews.review_title: W game, you should install it.
reviews.review_description: I have always wanted to be a moderator in any game this is the best gorilla tag fan game ever this is fun to play and I want to try to make it a good place for the community so everyone can have a good time together, have a good day and have fun playing this game i am happy to talk about everything that you ask me goodbye.
1 year ago I had this game and a guy with stick joined spammed n word banned me bruh like

Hey! As you know, we all love playing Gorilla Tag, and I’m really passionate about becoming a moderator. I want to help the community grow, make the game more enjoyable for everyone, and ensure it stays a fun, positive space—not like a chaotic COD lobby. I’m also working on developing this and other games, and I’d love the chance to contribute more. Let’s connect—join a code or add me on VR so we can chat more. No Discord needed. Thanks!

I was in a public lobby, having fun with the dude trying to teach him to play, and then this annoying little piece of strawberry sherbet came into my game and then he got me and the other dude band by reporting us for no freaking reason ￼

I downloaded the game and not even 3 minutes in I got banned for no reason, I was changing my name and color code when this guy shoves the stick in my face and I say I don’t care TAHT he has the stick. About three seconds later I get banned, PLEASE NEVER DOWNLOAD THIS
